hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" >> /tmp/claude_hook_debug.log; echo "$input" | grep -qi '/gsd' && touch /tmp/claude_gsd_ran || true

if [ -f /tmp/claude_gsd_ran ] && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain | grep -q .; then echo 'REMINDER: You ran a gsd command and there are uncommitted changes — did you forget a git commit?'; fi; rm -f /tmp/claude_gsd_ran
